name: raylog
title: Raylog
description: Manage local markdown-backed tasks from Raycast.
author: dillon-mccardell

commands.name: list-tasks
commands.title: List Tasks
commands.description: Browse, search, edit, and complete Raylog tasks.

preferences.name: storageNotePath
preferences.title: Storage Note
preferences.description: Markdown note used for Raylog storage.
preferences.label: Storage Note

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
